name: I talked to the insurance adjuster about my occupational illness already, did I mess up my claim?
description: Maybe; lawyer reviews, takes over talks now.

mainEntity.name: I talked to the insurance adjuster about my occupational illness already, did I mess up my claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe; lawyer reviews, takes over talks now.
acceptedAnswer.description:
Possibly; statements can be used against you.

Adjusters minimize payouts; recorded talks risky.

- Don't sign anything.
- Get lawyer before more contact.
- Review what was said.

Professional handles from now.
